mapper.sql: id, api_id, driver_name, tel, vehicle_code, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into car_driver (id, api_id, driver_name, tel, vehicle_code, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.apiId}, #{item.driverName}, #{item.tel}, #{item.vehicleCode}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update driver_name = values(driver_name), tel = values(tel), vehicle_code = values(vehicle_code), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = sysdate()
